name: Creamed Flounder Tarragon
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium-sized, heat-resistant, non-metallic skillet, melt butter in the Microwave Oven for 30 seconds. Add chopped onion and heat, uncovered, in the Microwave Oven for 3 minutes, or until the onion is soft.
2. Add tarragon leaves and mushrooms to onions and heat, covered, in the Microwave Oven for 3 minutes.
3. In a small bowl, combine sour cream, light cream, paprika, salt, and flour. Stir into the onion-mushroom mixture. Heat, uncovered, for 2 minutes in the Microwave Oven. Stir again, then heat uncovered for an additional minute.
4. In a buttered, 3-quart, heat-resistant, non-metallic baking dish, pour half of the mushroom sauce. Arrange fillets on top. Spoon remaining mushroom sauce over fish and sprinkle with parsley flakes.
5. Heat, uncovered, in the Microwave Oven for 7 minutes, or until fish flakes easily with a fork.
